name: Ocal Browser V7.5.00
body:
OCAL BROWSER - UPDATE CATALOG
Version: 7.5.00
Release Date: July 16, 2026

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[STYLE STUDIO TRANSITIONS & LIGHT MODE OVERHAUL]
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
* THEME MODE SWITCHER: Integrated a unified Dark/Light theme mode controller directly at the top of the Style Studio panel.
* HIGH CONTRAST FOOTER COMMAND DOCK: Redesigned the homepage footer capsule to feature solid, high-contrast white background and dark text on light mode to prevent low-contrast overlaps.
* SOLID STYLE DRAWERS: Replaced translucent glass customizer backgrounds with clean, solid #0f0f11 (Dark) and #f4f4f7 (Light) panels for enhanced professional aesthetics.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[SETTINGS PAGES REDESIGN & SOLID BENTO LAYOUT]
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
* REDESIGNED ABOUT OCAL TAB: Replaced the mismatched product card layout with a clean horizontal Bento Hero Card on top and a symmetric bento grid below.
* SYMMETRIC SEARCH GRID: Replaced the horizontal squished search engines selection bar with a structured 3-column grid that scales responsively.
* PROFILES HUB ALIGNMENT: Simplified the profiles workspace registry by removing redundant buttons and utilizing a solid-colored 2-column layout.
* COMPACT WHAT'S NEW SETTINGS: Embedded the v7.5.00 changelog catalog directly inside the settings page as a full-viewport borderless iframe with compact custom scrollbars.
